name: dotnet-claude-kit
description: The definitive .NET development knowledge base for Kimi Code CLI. Access 47 skills, 10 agents, and 16 commands on demand.

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List all available .NET development skills with names and descriptions

tools.name: get_skill
tools.description: Get the full markdown content of a specific skill by name (e.g. modern-csharp, ef-core, clean-architecture)

name.description: Skill name, e.g. modern-csharp, ef-core, clean-architecture

tools.name: get_agent
tools.description: Get the full markdown content of a specific agent by name (e.g. dotnet-architect, api-designer)

name.description: Agent name, e.g. dotnet-architect, api-designer, test-engineer

tools.name: run_hook
tools.description: Run a quality guard hook script by name (e.g. pre-commit-antipattern, pre-build-validate, post-edit-format)

name.description: Hook name without .sh extension, e.g. pre-commit-antipattern, pre-build-validate

tools.name: install_skills
tools.description: Install all 47 .NET skills globally so they auto-discover in every project. Creates symlinks in ~/.kimi/skills/ and ~/.claude/skills/.

tools.name: remove_skills
tools.description: Remove globally installed .NET skills from ~/.kimi/skills/ and ~/.claude/skills/
